mapper.select:
SELECT inst_seq, inst_name, inst_cd, inst_code, inst_zip_no, inst_addr, inst_dtl_addr, inst_tel_no, inst_email, inst_desc, rgst_user_id, TO_CHAR(rgst_date_time,'YY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rgstDateTime, upt_user_id, TO_CHAR(upt_date_time,'YY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS uptDateTime, use_flag FROM tb_inst WHERE 0=0
AND use_flag = true
AND inst_name LIKE '%'|| #{instName} ||'%'
ORDER BY inst_seq
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inst SET inst_name = #{instName}, inst_cd = #{instCd}, inst_code = #{instCode}, inst_zip_no = #{instZipNo}, inst_addr = #{instAddr}, inst_dtl_addr = #{instDtlAddr}, inst_tel_no = #{instTelNo}, inst_email = #{instEmail}, inst_desc = #{instDesc}, upt_user_id = #{userId}, upt_date_time = NOW(), use_flag=#{useFlag} WHERE inst_seq= #{instSeq}
